name: Lemon Shaker Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. For 1 serving: Use 2 Tablespoons.
This tasty, very low-calorie dressing can be used as a marinade for vegetables and meat.
2. Combine all ingredients in a pint jar.
3. Cover tightly and shake vigorously.
4. Store in the refrigerator.
5. Shake before using.
